🎬 Squid Game – Season 3: Alternate Ending (Fan Version)

As the final episode ends, we see Gi-hun apparently take his own life for the sake of the little girl.
Tears, shock, silence…
Everyone believes he’s dead.

But the truth?
It was all part of his plan.


---

🔍 The Twist

🔹 The body found wasn’t Gi-hun. It was a decoy — someone who switched clothes with him at the last second.

🔹 The footage? Fake. Leaked on purpose by an insider within the organization who’s been helping Gi-hun secretly.

🔹 The public? Distracted. The Front Man? Fooled. The VIPs? Pleased — for now.


---

💻 A Mysterious Message

A few days later, the system of the Squid Game is hacked.
All screens go black. Then a message appears:

> "Justice doesn’t come from outside the game…
It comes from within.
Prepare yourselves.
– G.H"



Everyone in the organization is stunned. Fear spreads. The Game is compromised.


---

🎭 Meanwhile...

Somewhere in a dark room, Gi-hun is alive.
Watching. Planning. Training.

With a small group of allies, ex-survivors, and secret insiders, he prepares for his final mission:

💥 Destroy the Game… from the inside.


---

🎤 Final Voiceover (Gi-hun speaking)

> “I didn’t want to die…
But if life itself is just a game —
Then I’ll be the last player standing.”



[End of Season 3]
[To be continued...]


---

 Season 3 Episode 3 Summary: “It’s Not Your Fault”
This episode follows a brutal Jump Rope–style game across a collapsing bridge.

Jun‑hee (Player 222), who went into labour earlier in E2, gives birth during that earlier game—her baby now becomes part of the competition, inheriting “Player 222.” 

The episode title speaks to the trauma many players carry. One standout is Geum‑ja, the grieving mother:

“She begs everyone to stop the game and save Jun‑hee and her baby… then kills herself overnight.” 


Gi‑hun is spiraling. He tries to take his own life again but is stopped, handcuffed and forced to continue playing. 

Jun-ho and his anti-Game team edge closer to locating the island, but their tracker plan fails—they're still hunting for the elusive arena. 

As the coffins are delivered and the oppressive game atmosphere intensifies, alliances forge and fracture under the brutal weight of survival.

저는 러시아에서 온 팬입니다. ‘오징어 게임’ 시즌 3를 보고 너무 큰 감정을 느껴서 이렇게 편지를 쓰게 되었습니다.

마지막에 기훈이 말한 "우리는 말이 아니야, 우리는 사람이야"라는 대사는 제 마음을 깊이 울렸습니다. 그 순간, 저는 눈물을 참을 수 없었습니다. 이 말이 저에게는 단순한 대사가 아니라, 인간의 고통과 존엄성에 대한 절규처럼 느껴졌습니다.

기훈이라는 캐릭터를 통해 인간성과 희망, 고통과 용기에 대해 다시 생각하게 되었습니다. 그 연기에 진심으로 감사드립니다. 이정재 님의 연기는 저의 마음을 울렸고, 오랫동안 기억에 남을 것입니다.

혹시 이 편지가 닿지 않더라도, 진심으로 감사하다는 말을 전하고 싶었습니다.
항상 건강하시고, 앞으로도 멋진 작품으로 많은 사람들에게 감동을 주시길 바랍니다.

감사합니다.

– 당신의 팬, [Твоё имя или просто “러시아 팬”]

Aftermath

Quem: Follow me to this vertical tunnel.

Albaz: Follow you where?

Quem: You see before you the Duel Terminal's Tunnel of History.

Albaz: Tunnel of...history?

Quem: Yes. This place holds the entire recorded history between Earth and the Spirit World. At the start, our worlds began from 6 Spirits of different types. There are Human and Beast Type spirits.

Sherry: Yes, yes, yes! That much we know!

Quem: There is more...The Six Signer Dragons banded together to defeat Z-one and then sealed him away into the dystopian world in the far future.

Sherry: All of us have heard this history lesson before!

Quem: Silence and listen! Behold and learn...Z-one's demise led to this. The dragons freed the spirits...all 6 were released onto the Earth. The spirits needed to be protected, so they were entrusted to 3 of the most prominent figures in Asia. Two were given to Hwang In-ho, while the rest of the Four were placed in the care of the Goodwin brothers. And the dragons fell to sleep. And it was wonderful. You see, the period of time was characterized by a long and lasting peace...that existed throughout our worlds, but Z-one was waiting, biding his time, knowing the time would come when he would be revived...Waiting patiently for his chance...Then one day, an opportunity arose. He projected his aura onto the Goodwin brothers and In-ho. The Goodwin brothers were victims of Despair, but In-ho suffered a far worse fate after participating in the Squid Games founded by the followers of Iliaster. He not only lost his wife, but his unborn child as well. His heart was drowned in darkness. After that, he became the front man after winning the Squid Game during that time, eventually Z-one used the Front Man to collect spiritual energy for himself by eliminating 455 players and harvesting their organs in every Squid Game he hosted. The result is the ravished timeline you see before you. Eaten away by the Treachery of Z-one. When Gi-hun vanquished In-ho, the massive amount of Spiritual Energy that he gathered was released, sent away into the future, and absorbed by Z-one. 

Aluber: Hey wait! So In-ho didn't really know anything!

Ecclesia: It was Z-one! But he acted through In-ho!

Quem: All of this brings us to the present. Bear witness to the deplorable condition of our timeline!

Albaz: Who is that?

Ecclesia: They're taking away these innocent lives!

Kitt: This is horrible.

Albaz: Alright, so tell us! Who are they?!

Quem: I don't know. I'd say...now that the Front Man is gone, these are the other underlings that have been sent by Z-one to continue his plans on creating his "Perfect Future". Now you understand what's happening. Z-one will use any means necessary in order to achieve his goals, and if they succeed, Z-one will be revived!! That is my prophecy.

Albaz: You mean?

Quem: When our timeline is erased, the Spirit World will be--destroyed.
